title: Wireless Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and plush memory foam ear cushions for all-day comfort.

title: Leather Backpack
description: Handcrafted full-grain leather backpack with padded laptop sleeve, multiple organizer pockets, and brass hardware.

title: Running Shoes
description: Lightweight performance running shoes with responsive cushioning, breathable mesh upper, and carbon-rubber outsole.

title: Smart Watch
description: Advanced smartwatch with heart-rate monitoring, GPS tracking, 5-day battery, and always-on AMOLED display.

title: Cotton T-Shirt
description: Ultra-soft 100% organic cotton crew-neck tee. Pre-shrunk, reinforced stitching, and a relaxed fit.

title: Ceramic Mug
description: Stoneware ceramic mug with minimalist matte glaze. Holds 14 oz. Microwave and dishwasher safe.

title: Denim Jacket
description: Classic denim jacket in medium-wash indigo. Button front, chest pockets, and adjustable waist tabs.

title: Wireless Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with silent clicks, 6 programmable buttons, and 12-month battery life.
